generated_oml:
instance DS18S20TemperatureSensorA : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 1-Wire digital thermometer with unique 64-bit serial code measuring temperatures from -55°C to +125°C with 0.5°C accuracy between -10°C and 85°C"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureData
]

instance DS18S20TemperatureSensorB : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 1-Wire digital thermometer with unique 64-bit serial code measuring temperatures from -55°C to +125°C with 0.5°C accuracy between -10°C and 85°C"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureData
]

instance DS18S20TemperatureSensorC : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 1-Wire digital thermometer with unique 64-bit serial code measuring temperatures from -55°C to +125°C with 0.5°C accuracy between -10°C and 85°C"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureData
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DS18S20TemperatureSensorA, DS18S20TemperatureSensorB, DS18S20TemperatureSensorC
]

instance TemperatureSensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature readings from three DS18S20 sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEnabler, ScipyEnabler
]

instance SimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for running dynamic thermal models (Model A and B) for temperature prediction"
    DTDFVocab:enables TemperaturePredictionService
]

instance ScipyEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Scipy optimization library used for model calibration and operational optimization"
    DTDFVocab:enables CalibrationService, OptimizationService
]

instance RabbitMQMessageBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Message brokering service for real-time data transmission between physical sensors and DT components"
    DTDFVocab:enables TemperaturePredictionService, CalibrationService, FaultDetectionService, SupervisoryControlService, StateEstimationService, OptimizationService
]

instance OpenSourceRepository : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Open-source repository for storing and sharing system source code and documentation"
    DTDFVocab:enables CodeManagementService
]

instance ModelA : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic thermal model with two free parameters for temperature prediction using energy flow equations"
]

instance ModelB : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic thermal model with four free parameters for temperature prediction using energy flow equations"
]

instance Heatbed : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Heating element controlled via MOSFETs and optocouplers to manage 4A current requirements"
]

instance Fan : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Air circulation fan controlled via MOSFETs and optocouplers for thermal distribution"
]

instance ControlPCB : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Printed circuit board containing MOSFETs and optocouplers for managing 4A current to heatbed and fan"
]

instance RaspberryPi4 : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B hardware controller for thermal incubator system"
]

instance ThermalIncubatorSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains Heatbed, Fan, ControlPCB, DS18S20TemperatureSensorA, DS18S20TemperatureSensorB, DS18S20TemperatureSensorC, RaspberryPi4
]

instance TemperaturePredictionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predicts temperature behavior using simulation models for safe operation"
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperaturePredictionInsight
]

instance CalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Calibrates simulation models using non-linear least squares optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides CalibratedModelParameters
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Detects anomalies and faults in the thermal incubator system"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyViolationDetected
]

instance SupervisoryControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Supervises and controls the thermal incubator's operation for safety and efficiency"
    DTDFVocab:provides SuboptimalPerformanceDetected, AdjustSetpointAutomatic, AdjustSetpointManual
]

instance StateEstimationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Estimates current system state using sensor data and models"
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemStateEstimate
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimizes thermal control parameters for safe and efficient operation"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalControlParameters
]

instance CodeVersionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Code version information and documentation status"
]

instance CodeManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Manages and shares source code and documentation via open-source repository"
    DTDFVocab:provides CodeVersionInsight
]

instance TemperaturePredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted temperature values for thermal incubator system"
]

instance CalibratedModelParameters : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Calibrated parameters for thermal simulation models"
]

instance SafetyViolationDetected : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detected safety violation in thermal incubator system"
]

instance SuboptimalPerformanceDetected : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detected suboptimal performance in thermal incubator system"
]

instance SystemStateEstimate : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Estimated current state of thermal incubator system"
]

instance OptimalControlParameters : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimized control parameters for thermal system"
]

instance AdjustSetpointAutomatic : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustment of setpoint temperature based on DT predictions"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AdjustSetpointManual : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Manual adjustment of setpoint temperature by human operator"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Commands (e.g., heatbed on/off, fan control) from DT via RabbitMQ are processed by the controller and executed by the low-level driver through MOSFETs to actuate the heatbed and fan."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated components including RabbitMQ server (on Raspberry Pi), controller, low-level driver, and simulation models with data flowing via RabbitMQ between PT sensors and DT components."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT operates in the 'as operated' phase, integrating models post-deployment for ongoing monitoring and control of the physical incubator."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Models validated by comparing predictions with experimental temperature data, testing assumptions (e.g., uniformity via three sensors), and minimizing residual error during calibration."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker using AMQP protocol for communication between PT sensors/actuators and DT components."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ server and DT components deployed on the Raspberry Pi 4 Model B, co-located with the PT controller."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Low-level driver incorporates safe protocol to maintain device safety; bang-bang controller uses upper and lower temperature limits to prevent overheating."
]
